$comment: Claude Code plugin manifest. Activates the agents/, hooks/, skills/ subtrees. Claude Code 2.1+ unified commands into skills, so previous `commands/` content lives under `skills/` now and slash commands come from `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` with `user-invocable: true`.
name: ai-pipe-core
description: Multi-agent automation pipeline: PM/Architect/Backend/Frontend/Infra/QA/Test/Reviewer/Verifier/Project-Ops agents, with PreToolUse safety hooks and GitHub Issues/Projects V2 integration scripts.
